name: Variscan Mines Limited
description: Variscan Mines Limited is an Australia-based natural resources company focused on the acquisition, exploration, and development of high-quality strategic mineral projects. The company is primarily engaged in the exploration of zinc assets, with a significant operational focus in northern Spain and Ireland. Formerly known as PlatSearch NL, Variscan Mines Limited has a long-standing history in the mining sector, dedicated to identifying and advancing mineral deposits to create value for its shareholders through disciplined exploration and development strategies across its diverse portfolio of projects.
